mapper.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT NVL(AP.AUCTION_TITLE, '📢 From. 희희낙찰') sender, A.AL_CONTENT alContent, TO_CHAR(A.AL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD / HH24:MI') alDate, NF.CATE_NUM cateNum, A.AL_REQ_SEQ reqSeq, A.AL_NUM alNum, A.AL_CHECK alCheck FROM ALARM A JOIN NF_CATEGORY NF ON (A.CATE_NUM = NF.CATE_NUM) JOIN AUC_PRODUCT AP ON (A.AL_REQ_SEQ = AP.PRODUCT_SEQ) WHERE A.ID = #{userId} AND A.CATE_NUM = 8 -- 경매물품 판매 상태 AND A.AL_REQ_SEQ = AP.PRODUCT_SEQ UNION ALL SELECT NVL(S.ARTICLE_TITLE, '📢 From. 희희낙찰') sender, A.AL_CONTENT alContent, TO_CHAR(A.AL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD / HH24:MI') alDate, NF.CATE_NUM cateNum, A.AL_REQ_SEQ reqSeq, A.AL_NUM alNum, A.AL_CHECK alCheck FROM ALARM A JOIN NF_CATEGORY NF ON (A.CATE_NUM = NF.CATE_NUM) JOIN SELL_PRODUCT S ON (A.ID = S.ID) WHERE A.ID = #{userId} AND A.CATE_NUM = 7 -- 중고물품 판매 상태 AND A.AL_REQ_SEQ = S.PRODUCT_SEQ UNION ALL SELECT NVL(B.BAN_CONTENT, '📢 From. 희희낙찰') sender, A.AL_CONTENT alContent, TO_CHAR(A.AL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD / HH24:MI') alDate, NF.CATE_NUM cateNum, A.AL_REQ_SEQ reqSeq, A.AL_NUM alNum, A.AL_CHECK alCheck FROM ALARM A JOIN NF_CATEGORY NF ON (A.CATE_NUM = NF.CATE_NUM) JOIN BAN_HISTORY B ON (A.ID = B.ID) WHERE A.ID = #{userId} AND A.CATE_NUM = 6 -- 계정 정지 UNION ALL SELECT NVL(AP.AUCTION_TITLE, '📢 From. 희희낙찰') sender, A.AL_CONTENT alContent, TO_CHAR(A.AL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD / HH24:MI') alDate, NF.CATE_NUM cateNum, A.AL_REQ_SEQ reqSeq, A.AL_NUM alNum, A.AL_CHECK alCheck FROM ALARM A JOIN NF_CATEGORY NF ON (A.CATE_NUM = NF.CATE_NUM) JOIN AUC_PRODUCT AP ON (A.AL_REQ_SEQ = AP.PRODUCT_SEQ) JOIN DEAL_HISTORY DH ON (A.ID = DH.BUYER_ID) JOIN DELIVERY D ON (DH.S_SEQ = D.S_SEQ) WHERE A.ID = #{userId} AND A.CATE_NUM = 5 -- 송장 입력 (경매물품) AND A.AL_REQ_SEQ = DH.AUC_SEQ UNION ALL SELECT NVL(S.ARTICLE_TITLE, '📢 From. 희희낙찰') sender, A.AL_CONTENT alContent, TO_CHAR(A.AL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD / HH24:MI') alDate, NF.CATE_NUM cateNum, A.AL_REQ_SEQ reqSeq, A.AL_NUM alNum, A.AL_CHECK alCheck FROM ALARM A JOIN NF_CATEGORY NF ON (A.CATE_NUM = NF.CATE_NUM) JOIN SELL_PRODUCT S ON (A.AL_REQ_SEQ = S.PRODUCT_SEQ) JOIN DEAL_HISTORY DH ON (A.ID = DH.BUYER_ID) JOIN DELIVERY D ON (DH.S_SEQ = D.S_SEQ) WHERE A.ID = #{userId} AND A.CATE_NUM = 5 -- 송장 입력 (중고물품) AND A.AL_REQ_SEQ = DH.SELL_SEQ UNION ALL SELECT NVL(Q.QNA_TITLE, '📢 From. 희희낙찰') sender, A.AL_CONTENT alContent, TO_CHAR(A.AL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD / HH24:MI') alDate, NF.CATE_NUM cateNum, A.AL_REQ_SEQ reqSeq, A.AL_NUM alNum, A.AL_CHECK alCheck FROM ALARM A JOIN NF_CATEGORY NF ON (A.CATE_NUM = NF.CATE_NUM) JOIN QNA_BOARD Q ON (A.ID = Q.ID) WHERE A.ID = #{userId} AND A.CATE_NUM = 4 -- 문의 AND A.AL_REQ_SEQ = Q.SEQ_QNA_BNO UNION ALL SELECT NVL(AP.AUCTION_TITLE, '📢 From. 희희낙찰') sender, A.AL_CONTENT alContent, TO_CHAR(A.AL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD / HH24:MI') alDate, NF.CATE_NUM cateNum, A.AL_REQ_SEQ reqSeq, A.AL_NUM alNum, A.AL_CHECK alCheck FROM ALARM A JOIN NF_CATEGORY NF ON (A.CATE_NUM = NF.CATE_NUM) JOIN AUC_PRODUCT AP ON (A.AL_REQ_SEQ = AP.PRODUCT_SEQ) WHERE A.ID = #{userId} AND A.CATE_NUM = 3 -- 경매 AND A.AL_REQ_SEQ = AP.PRODUCT_SEQ UNION ALL SELECT NVL(S.ARTICLE_TITLE, '📢 From. 희희낙찰') sender, A.AL_CONTENT alContent, TO_CHAR(A.AL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD / HH24:MI') alDate, NF.CATE_NUM cateNum, A.AL_REQ_SEQ reqSeq, A.AL_NUM alNum, A.AL_CHECK alCheck FROM ALARM A JOIN NF_CATEGORY NF ON (A.CATE_NUM = NF.CATE_NUM) JOIN SELL_PRODUCT S ON (A.AL_REQ_SEQ = S.PRODUCT_SEQ) WHERE A.ID = #{userId} AND A.CATE_NUM = 2 -- 판매 AND A.AL_REQ_SEQ = S.PRODUCT_SEQ UNION ALL SELECT NVL(CM.SENDER, '📢 From. 희희낙찰') sender, A.AL_CONTENT alContent, TO_CHAR(A.AL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD / HH24:MI') alDate, NF.CATE_NUM cateNum, A.AL_REQ_SEQ reqSeq, A.AL_NUM alNum, A.AL_CHECK alCheck FROM ALARM A JOIN NF_CATEGORY NF ON (A.CATE_NUM = NF.CATE_NUM) JOIN CHAT_MESSAGE CM ON (A.ID = CM.RECEIVER) WHERE A.ID = #{userId} AND A.CATE_NUM = 1 -- 채팅 AND A.AL_REQ_SEQ = CM.MSG_ID) WHERE ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(alDate, 'YYYY/MM/DD / HH24:MI'), 1) > SYSDATE ORDER BY alDate DESC NULLS LAST, alCheck NULLS LAST

SELECT * FROM(SELECT NVL(MAX(AP.AUCTION_TITLE), '📢 From. 희희낙찰') sender, MAX(A.AL_CONTENT) alContent, MAX(TO_CHAR(A.AL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD / HH24:MI')) alDate, MAX(NF.CATE_NUM) cateNum, MAX(A.AL_REQ_SEQ) reqSeq, MAX(A.AL_NUM) alNum, MAX(A.AL_CHECK) alCheck FROM ALARM A JOIN NF_CATEGORY NF ON (A.CATE_NUM = NF.CATE_NUM) JOIN AUC_PRODUCT AP ON (A.AL_REQ_SEQ = AP.PRODUCT_SEQ) WHERE A.ID = #{userId} AND A.CATE_NUM = 8 -- 경매물품 판매 재개 AND A.AL_REQ_SEQ = AP.PRODUCT_SEQ AND AUC_STATUS = '입찰' AND AL_CHECK = 'N' AND A.AL_NUM = (SELECT MAX(IA.AL_NUM) FROM ALARM IA WHERE IA.CATE_NUM = 8 AND IA.ID = A.ID AND IA.AL_CHECK = 'N') UNION ALL SELECT NVL(MAX(AP.AUCTION_TITLE), '📢 From. 희희낙찰') sender, MAX(A.AL_CONTENT) alContent, MAX(TO_CHAR(A.AL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD / HH24:MI')) alDate, MAX(NF.CATE_NUM) cateNum, MAX(A.AL_REQ_SEQ) reqSeq, MAX(A.AL_NUM) alNum, MAX(A.AL_CHECK) alCheck FROM ALARM A JOIN NF_CATEGORY NF ON (A.CATE_NUM = NF.CATE_NUM) JOIN AUC_PRODUCT AP ON (A.AL_REQ_SEQ = AP.PRODUCT_SEQ) WHERE A.ID = #{userId} AND A.CATE_NUM = 8 -- 경매물품 판매중지 AND A.AL_REQ_SEQ = AP.PRODUCT_SEQ AND AUC_STATUS = '판매중지' AND AL_CHECK = 'N' AND A.AL_NUM = (SELECT MAX(IA.AL_NUM) FROM ALARM IA WHERE IA.CATE_NUM = 8 AND IA.ID = A.ID AND IA.AL_CHECK = 'N') UNION ALL SELECT NVL(MAX(S.ARTICLE_TITLE), '📢 From. 희희낙찰') sender, MAX(A.AL_CONTENT) alContent, MAX(TO_CHAR(A.AL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD / HH24:MI')) alDate, MAX(NF.CATE_NUM) cateNum, MAX(A.AL_REQ_SEQ) reqSeq, MAX(A.AL_NUM) alNum, MAX(A.AL_CHECK) alCheck FROM ALARM A JOIN NF_CATEGORY NF ON (A.CATE_NUM = NF.CATE_NUM) JOIN SELL_PRODUCT S ON (A.ID = S.ID) WHERE A.ID = #{userId} AND A.CATE_NUM = 7 -- 중고물품 판매 재개 AND A.AL_REQ_SEQ = S.PRODUCT_SEQ AND S.PRO_STATUS = '판매중' AND AL_CHECK = 'N' AND A.AL_NUM = (SELECT MAX(IA.AL_NUM) FROM ALARM IA WHERE IA.CATE_NUM = 7 AND IA.ID = A.ID AND IA.AL_CHECK = 'N') UNION ALL SELECT NVL(MAX(S.ARTICLE_TITLE), '📢 From. 희희낙찰') sender, MAX(A.AL_CONTENT) alContent, MAX(TO_CHAR(A.AL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD / HH24:MI')) alDate, MAX(NF.CATE_NUM) cateNum, MAX(A.AL_REQ_SEQ) reqSeq, MAX(A.AL_NUM) alNum, MAX(A.AL_CHECK) alCheck FROM ALARM A JOIN NF_CATEGORY NF ON (A.CATE_NUM = NF.CATE_NUM) JOIN SELL_PRODUCT S ON (A.ID = S.ID) WHERE A.ID = #{userId} AND A.CATE_NUM = 7 -- 중고물품 판매중지 AND A.AL_REQ_SEQ = S.PRODUCT_SEQ AND S.PRO_STATUS = '판매중지' AND AL_CHECK = 'N' AND A.AL_NUM = (SELECT MAX(IA.AL_NUM) FROM ALARM IA WHERE IA.CATE_NUM = 7 AND IA.ID = A.ID AND IA.AL_CHECK = 'N') UNION ALL SELECT NVL(MAX(B.BAN_CONTENT), '📢 From. 희희낙찰') sender, MAX(A.AL_CONTENT) alContent, MAX(TO_CHAR(A.AL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD / HH24:MI')) alDate, MAX(NF.CATE_NUM) cateNum, MAX(A.AL_REQ_SEQ) reqSeq, MAX(A.AL_NUM) alNum, MAX(A.AL_CHECK) alCheck FROM ALARM A JOIN NF_CATEGORY NF ON (A.CATE_NUM = NF.CATE_NUM) JOIN BAN_HISTORY B ON (A.ID = B.ID) WHERE A.ID = #{userId} AND A.CATE_NUM = 6 -- 계정 정지 AND AL_CHECK = 'N' AND A.AL_NUM = (SELECT MAX(IA.AL_NUM) FROM ALARM IA WHERE IA.CATE_NUM = 6 AND IA.ID = A.ID AND IA.AL_CHECK = 'N') UNION ALL SELECT NVL(MAX(Q.QNA_TITLE), '📢 From. 희희낙찰') sender, MAX(A.AL_CONTENT) alContent, MAX(TO_CHAR(A.AL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD / HH24:MI')) alDate, MAX(NF.CATE_NUM) cateNum, MAX(A.AL_REQ_SEQ) reqSeq, MAX(A.AL_NUM) alNum, MAX(A.AL_CHECK) alCheck FROM ALARM A JOIN NF_CATEGORY NF ON (A.CATE_NUM = NF.CATE_NUM) JOIN QNA_BOARD Q ON (A.ID = Q.ID) WHERE A.ID = #{userId} AND A.CATE_NUM = 4 -- 문의 AND A.AL_REQ_SEQ = Q.SEQ_QNA_BNO AND AL_CHECK = 'N' AND A.AL_NUM = (SELECT MAX(IA.AL_NUM) FROM ALARM IA WHERE IA.CATE_NUM = 4 AND IA.ID = A.ID AND IA.AL_CHECK = 'N') UNION ALL SELECT NVL(MAX(S.ARTICLE_TITLE), '📢 From. 희희낙찰') sender, MAX(A.AL_CONTENT) alContent, MAX(TO_CHAR(A.AL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD / HH24:MI')) alDate, MAX(NF.CATE_NUM) cateNum, MAX(A.AL_REQ_SEQ) reqSeq, MAX(A.AL_NUM) alNum, MAX(A.AL_CHECK) alCheck FROM ALARM A JOIN NF_CATEGORY NF ON (A.CATE_NUM = NF.CATE_NUM) JOIN SELL_PRODUCT S ON (A.AL_REQ_SEQ = S.PRODUCT_SEQ) WHERE A.ID = #{userId} AND A.CATE_NUM = 2 -- 판매 AND A.AL_REQ_SEQ = S.PRODUCT_SEQ AND AL_CHECK = 'N' AND A.AL_NUM = (SELECT MAX(IA.AL_NUM) FROM ALARM IA WHERE IA.CATE_NUM = 2 AND IA.ID = A.ID AND IA.AL_CHECK = 'N') UNION ALL SELECT NVL(MAX(AP.AUCTION_TITLE), '📢 From. 희희낙찰') sender, MAX(A.AL_CONTENT) alContent, MAX(TO_CHAR(A.AL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD / HH24:MI')) alDate, MAX(NF.CATE_NUM) cateNum, MAX(A.AL_REQ_SEQ) reqSeq, MAX(A.AL_NUM) alNum, MAX(A.AL_CHECK) alCheck FROM ALARM A JOIN NF_CATEGORY NF ON (A.CATE_NUM = NF.CATE_NUM) JOIN AUC_PRODUCT AP ON (A.AL_REQ_SEQ = AP.PRODUCT_SEQ) JOIN DEAL_HISTORY DH ON (A.ID = DH.BUYER_ID) JOIN DELIVERY D ON (DH.S_SEQ = D.S_SEQ) WHERE A.ID = #{userId} AND A.CATE_NUM = 5 -- 송장 입력 (경매물품) AND A.AL_REQ_SEQ = DH.AUC_SEQ AND D.D_STATUS = '발송완료' AND AL_CHECK = 'N' AND A.AL_NUM = (SELECT MAX(IA.AL_NUM) FROM ALARM IA WHERE IA.CATE_NUM = 5 AND IA.ID = A.ID AND IA.AL_CHECK = 'N') UNION ALL SELECT NVL(MAX(S.ARTICLE_TITLE), '📢 From. 희희낙찰') sender, MAX(A.AL_CONTENT) alContent, MAX(TO_CHAR(A.AL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD / HH24:MI')) alDate, MAX(NF.CATE_NUM) cateNum, MAX(A.AL_REQ_SEQ) reqSeq, MAX(A.AL_NUM) alNum, MAX(A.AL_CHECK) alCheck FROM ALARM A JOIN NF_CATEGORY NF ON (A.CATE_NUM = NF.CATE_NUM) JOIN SELL_PRODUCT S ON (A.AL_REQ_SEQ = S.PRODUCT_SEQ) JOIN DEAL_HISTORY DH ON (A.ID = DH.BUYER_ID) JOIN DELIVERY D ON (DH.S_SEQ = D.S_SEQ) WHERE A.ID = #{userId} AND A.CATE_NUM = 5 -- 송장 입력 (중고물품) AND A.AL_REQ_SEQ = DH.SELL_SEQ AND D.D_STATUS = '발송완료' AND AL_CHECK = 'N' AND A.AL_NUM = (SELECT MAX(IA.AL_NUM) FROM ALARM IA WHERE IA.CATE_NUM = 5 AND IA.ID = A.ID AND IA.AL_CHECK = 'N') UNION ALL SELECT NVL(MAX(AP.AUCTION_TITLE), '📢 From. 희희낙찰') sender, MAX(A.AL_CONTENT) alContent, MAX(TO_CHAR(A.AL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD / HH24:MI')) alDate, MAX(NF.CATE_NUM) cateNum, MAX(A.AL_REQ_SEQ) reqSeq, MAX(A.AL_NUM) alNum, MAX(A.AL_CHECK) alCheck FROM ALARM A JOIN NF_CATEGORY NF ON (A.CATE_NUM = NF.CATE_NUM) JOIN AUC_PRODUCT AP ON (A.AL_REQ_SEQ = AP.PRODUCT_SEQ) WHERE A.ID = #{userId} AND A.CATE_NUM = 3 -- 경매 AND A.AL_REQ_SEQ = AP.PRODUCT_SEQ AND AL_CHECK = 'N' AND A.AL_NUM = (SELECT MAX(IA.AL_NUM) FROM ALARM IA WHERE IA.CATE_NUM = 3 AND IA.ID = A.ID AND IA.AL_CHECK = 'N') UNION ALL SELECT NVL(CM.SENDER, '📢 From. 희희낙찰') sender, MAX(A.AL_CONTENT) alContent, MAX(TO_CHAR(CM.SEND_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD / HH24:MI')) alDate, MAX(NF.CATE_NUM) cateNum, MAX(A.AL_REQ_SEQ) reqSeq, MAX(A.AL_NUM) alNum, MAX(A.AL_CHECK) alCheck FROM ALARM A JOIN NF_CATEGORY NF ON (A.CATE_NUM = NF.CATE_NUM) JOIN CHAT_MESSAGE CM ON (A.ID = CM.RECEIVER) WHERE A.ID = #{userId} AND A.CATE_NUM = 1 -- 채팅 AND A.AL_REQ_SEQ = CM.MSG_ID AND CM.READ_CHECK = 'N' AND AL_CHECK = 'N' AND A.AL_NUM = (SELECT MAX(IA.AL_NUM) FROM ALARM IA WHERE IA.CATE_NUM = 1 AND IA.ID = A.ID AND IA.AL_CHECK = 'N') GROUP BY CM.SENDER) GROUP BY SENDER, ALCONTENT, ALDATE, CATENUM, REQSEQ, ALNUM, ALCHECK ORDER BY alDate DESC NULLS LAST, alCheck NULLS LAST
mapper.update: UPDATE ALARM SET AL_CHECK = 'Y' WHERE AL_NUM = #{alNum} AND AL_CHECK = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(AL_NUM) AS CNT FROM ALARM WHERE ID = #{userId} AND AL_CHECK = 'N'
